title: Job (Teacher)
prompt: Describe the job or career you have or hope to have.
questions: What should you do to be successful with it?

title: Movie (Titanic)
prompt: Describe a movie that you particularly like.
questions: What is the name of the movie?
Why do you particularly like it?

title: Wedding
prompt: Describe a wedding you have been to.
questions: What did you wear to the wedding?

title: Free Time Activity
prompt: Describe an activity you do when you are alone in your free time.
questions: Is it easy or difficult to do?
How do you feel when you do it?
Are there any benefits of doing it?

title: Favorite Photograph
questions: When and where was it taken?
How long have you had it?

title: Childhood Friend
prompt: Describe a childhood friend of yours.
questions: What did you like to do together?
